title: Magichome Filter Shower Head and Hose 1.5M, 20-Layer Filtration Universal Shower Head with 3 Modes, Water Saving High Pressure Hard Water Filter Showerhead for Residual Chlorine Remove
features: Attention: Please do not use this shower head on an electric shower.

【20-Stage Filtered Shower Head】 - Our filtered shower head features a 20-stage powerful filtration system. It is composed of various filters, including KDF, calcium sulfite, mineral balls, and ceramic balls. This shower head filter can efficiently remove residual chlorine, impurities, heavy metals, rust, sediments, and other harmful substances from the water, protecting you and your family's skin and hair. We recommend replacing the cartridge every 3 to 4 months.

【 45% Water-saving & High Pressure Shower Head】- This shower head features micro nozzle technology, making the outlet holes smaller and denser. It ensures a fast and dense water flow, achieving up to 45% water savings compared to other handheld showers. With a maximum water consumption of 6.54 L/min, it offers a water - efficient option for every household, even at low water pressure.

【3 Mode Powerful Shower Head】- This shower head has three spray modes: rainfall, mix, and mist. You can easily press the switch on the shower head to select your preferred mode according to your needs, satisfying family members' showering needs.

【One-touch Water Stop Shower Head】- The one-touch water stop function can quickly turn off the water in one second, providing a more convenient and safer shower experience. You can adjust the water pressure to your preferred level with a slight press of the on/off button.
